root.m_Talk_FRA: But that doesn't mean that I should sit on my hands and do nothing like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, please get out of my sight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, please get out of my sight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, please get out of my sight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The helpless and unknown me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The helpless and unknown me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The helpless and unknown me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the opening scene unfolds, the lead characters of the play start following the clues.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the opening scene unfolds, the lead characters of the play start following the clues.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the opening scene unfolds, the lead characters of the play start following the clues.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Minor, trivial incidents spread like wildfire, and the audience will soon figure out the true villain that triggered this entire narrative.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Minor, trivial incidents spread like wildfire, and the audience will soon figure out the true villain that triggered this entire narrative.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Minor, trivial incidents spread like wildfire, and the audience will soon figure out the true villain that triggered this entire narrative.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the preparations are complete, Ignorant Monarch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the preparations are complete, Ignorant Monarch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the preparations are complete, Ignorant Monarch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the trial that is yourself brings ruin to the world she chose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the trial that is yourself brings ruin to the world she chose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the trial that is yourself brings ruin to the world she chose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is when she... will realize who she is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is when she... will realize who she is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is when she... will realize who she is.
